mapper.select: SELECT id, sender_type, sender_role, staff_account_id, customer_account_id, reply_type, content, created_at FROM ticket_reply WHERE ticket_id = #{ticketId} AND business_domain_id = #{domainId} ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC
SELECT id FROM ticket_reply WHERE ticket_id = #{ticketId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
